segment-text: Dan Scanlon, Jason Headley & Keith Bunin Pixar Animation Studios
1200 Park Avenue Emeryville, CA * 94608 Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Long ago, the world was full of wonder!
EXT. FANTASY LANDSCAPE - DAY
We race over rolling green hills. A unicorn soars into view, whinnies, and banks off into the sky.
It was adventurous...
The land below is alive with FANTASY CREATURES. We pass through a field of racing CENTAURS.
Exciting...
Mermaids leap through shimming water and FAIRIES fly through the air, spiraling up into the sky.
And best of all... there was MAGIC!
We stop on an ELF WIZARD holding a gnarled wooden staff. He turns and thrusts his staff toward the sky, casting a spell.
Boombastia!
Fireworks shoot magically into the air. Fantasy creatures across the land watch in awe.
EXT. CLIFF - DAY
A small group of creatures huddle and shiver in the cold.
And that magic helped all in need.
A SATYR WIZARD approaches.
A fire appears and they happily warm themselves by it. (c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script INT. UNDERGROUND TUNNELS - NIGHT

A warrior, rogue, and wizard try to reach a glowing chalice. A dragon breathes FIRE at them. The warrior holds up a shield, protecting them from the flame. The BRAVE WIZARD leaps out and casts a spell. BRAVE WIZARD
A lighting bolt zaps the ceiling, crashing rocks down in front of the dragon, clearing their path to the chalice.
EXT. MUSHROOM VILLAGE - DUSK

A wizard teaches a young apprentice to conjure a glowing orb. She floats the orb into a mushroom house, filling it with light. The gnome resident of the house emerges, delighted. The apprentice attempts the spell, but only manages to catch his robe on FIRE. The wizard quickly puts out the flames and encourages the apprentice to try again.
But it wasn't easy to master. And so the world found a simpler way to get by...
The wizard and apprentice see a satyr INVENTOR in a barn surrounded by fantasy creatures.
I call it: the light bulb!

The inventor flips a switch and the lightbulb turns on, illuminating the room. The crowd is amazed. The apprentice hands the wizard the magical staff, walks toward the crowd, and gives the light bulb a try.
'Tis so easy!
The wizard looks on, disappointed.
MASTER WIZARD
An elf on a sales floor lights up a gas stove with a click, click. Everyone reacts in amazement. (c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Goblins sit in a cozy living room. One of them turns on a gas fireplace using a remote.
Over time, magic faded away...

A centaur plays "Prance Prance Revolution" in an arcade. A mermaid lounges in a kiddie pool, scrolling on her phone. A sprite, suitcase in hand, approaches an awaiting airplane. A factory assembly line rolls by. Traffic crawls along a congested highway.
EXT. SUBURBAN STREET - MORNING

A troll on a bicycle tosses papers onto doorsteps of mushroom houses with satellite dishes, garages, basketball hoops, etc. A feral unicorn roots around in a trash can. Another unicorn approaches and hisses. The first unicorn chases it off. We push into the upstairs window of a mushroom house.
INT. LIGHTFOOT HOUSE - IAN'S ROOM - MORNING
But I hope there's a little magic left... A phone alarm beeps. A boy's hand quickly silences it. Puts on his watch with style. His shoes with flair.
DAD (V.O.)

He pulls on his sweatshirt and gets stuck. He pulls harder until his big nose, wild hair, and giant ears pop out of the sweatshirt, revealing a lanky teenage elf: IAN LIGHTFOOT. Ian smiles and dusts off the "Willowdale College" sweatshirt. He grabs his backpack and pauses to look at his desk calendar. Today is circled and reads: 16TH BDAY. Ian looks into the mirror, smiles, and walks out of the room. TITLE: ONWARD (c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script EXT. MUSHROOM NEIGHBORHOOD - DAY
Ian walks downstairs to the beat of loud, pulsing music. LAUREL LIGHTFOOT, a female elf in her 40s, works out in front of the TV. An onscreen FITNESS INSTRUCTOR barks commands.
We're gonna get Warrior Z90 fit!
I'm a mighty warrior!
I'm a mighty warrior!
Morning, Mom!
A scaly Labrador-sized dragon, BLAZEY, races into the room and tackles Ian to the ground. Aahh!
Ian is trapped as the dragon happily licks his face.
Shh! Down girl! Please!
(noticing) Oh--! Blazey, down!
Laurel races over, squirting the dragon with a spray bottle.
Ah! Stop, girl, stop!
Bad dragon! Back to your lair!
Blazey blows a small puff of fire at Laurel and runs off. Ian stands and is attacked with Mom kisses.
Happy Birthday, mister adult man!
(struggling/laughing) Ugh, no, Mom! Ah! gross. (c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Hey, buddy, don't wipe off my kisses!
Laurel looks at Ian, touched.
You're wearing your Dad's sweatshirt.
Oh, you know. Finally fits.
Oh, my little chubby cheeks is all grown up!
Okay, okay, Mom! I gotta eat something before school.
INT. LIGHTFOOT KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS
Ian looks in the fridge for breakfast.
Ugh, we don't have much food. I still have to go to the grocery
store-Laurel smacks Ian's hand as he reaches for something.
Hands off, Mister! Those are for your party tonight.
Ian takes the milk from the fridge and closes the door.
It's not a party Mom, it just us.
Ian empties the last of a box of cereal into a bowl.
Well, you could invite those kids from your science class. You said they seemed pretty "rockin'."
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
I'm pretty sure I didn't say it like that. And besides, I don't even know them.
Well, your birthday is a day to try new things, be the "new you"!
Laurel makes herself a smoothie, yelling over the blender.
SPEAKING OF TRYING NEW THINGS, DID YOU SIGN UP FOR DRIVING PRACTICE?!
The blender stops, but Ian is still shouting.
No.
(quieter)
Laurel pours her shake into a glass.
I know you're a little scared to drive sweetie-pie, but-IAN I'm not scared, Mom. (pointing offscreen)
I'm gonna move Barley's game.
Okay, but you know how he gets when

someone touches that board. Ian walks to the kitchen table, stumbling over a plastic flail on the floor. The table is covered with a game: pewter figures, dice, and miniatures. Ian and begins to move them-IAN Well, he's gotta learn how to clean up his toys---when suddenly a huge, thick arm wraps around his neck. HALT! AHH!
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Ian is pulled into the hulking barrel chest of twenty-yearold BARLEY LIGHTFOOT.
Doth my brother dare disrupt an active campaign?!
Ian's cereal bowl is knocked to the floor in the scuffle.
Oh, come on!
You know, Ian, in the days of old, a boy of sixteen would have his strength tested in the Swamps of Despair.
I'm not testing anything, just let me go!
Let him go.
Barley releases Ian.
Okay, but I know you're stronger than that. There's a mighty warrior inside you. You just have to let him out. Riiight, Mom?
Barley puts Laurel in the same chokehold as she laughs.
Oh! That's good! Keepin' your head down.
(laughing) Barley, you stink! When was the last time you showered?
Blazey roars and leaps around. Amidst the chaos, Ian picks up his bowl from the floor and retreats to the kitchen counter.
If you tried a little harder, you actually could probably wiggle out
of this-Suddenly, Laurel flips Barley onto his back with a CRASH. (c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
See? Mom knows how to let out her inner warrior.
Barley reaches up to high-five Laurel.
Thank you. Now take out the trash.
EXT. LIGHTFOOT HOME - CONTINUOUS
As Barley opens the back door, trash in hand, we hear a police radio.
(fuzzy, over radio) --stay on the lookout for a runaway Griffin.
(groan) Officer Bronco.
OFFICER COLT BRONCO, a mustachioed, cocky cop with mirrored aviator sunglasses, speaks over the clop of horse hooves.
Barley, Barley, Barley. Every time the city tries to tear down an old piece of rubble, I gotta drag my rear end out here and deal with you.
As he steps closer, we see he's not a mounted police officer after all. He's a centaur cop.
I don't know what you're talking about.
Laurel appears in the doorway behind Barley, irritated.
Oh, really?
Colt pulls out his phone. A video shows Barley chained to an ancient fountain in front of a laughing crowd of people.
I will not let you tear this down this fountain! Ancient warriors on grand quests drank from it's flowing waters!
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
As construction workers pull him away, Barley falls into the water with a SPLASH. Barley.
They're destroying the town's past!
And last night, someone destroyed their bulldozer.
Ugh, well come on in, rest your haunches for a minute.
Thank you, hon.
Laurel and Colt kiss. Ian and Barley shudder in disgust.
INT. LIGHTFOOT HOME - KITCHEN - DAY
Colt approaches Ian in the kitchen.
Hey there, Birthday Boy... So ya workin' hard or hardly workin'? (horse laugh)
Colt punches Ian on the shoulder just a little too hard.
I'm just, you know... making a toast.
I'm serious, Barley, you need to start thinking less about the past and more about your future.
She's right.
As Colt turns, his tail knocks Ian's toast off the counter. It falls to the floor and is promptly snatched up by Blazey.
You can't spend all day playing your board game.
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Colt awkwardly plops his hindquarters into a chair at the table, toppling Quests of Yore pieces. Barley hustles over to set the pieces straight.
Uh, Quests of Yore isn't just a board game, it's an historicallybased role playing scenario. Did you know in the old days centaurs could run seventy miles an hour?
I own a vehicle, don't need to run.
Well, Ian, you could definitely learn a lot from Quests of Yore. You want to play? I don't.
Ian folds the last piece of toast and starts to take a bite-BARLEY
Barley puts the pewter wizard figure on Ian's shoulder.
(wizard voice) I shall cast a spell on thee!!
Hey, careful of Dad's sweatshirt.
I don't even remember Dad wearing that sweatshirt.
Well, you do only have, like, two memories of him.
No! I've got three. I remember his beard was scratchy, he had a goofy laugh, and I used to play-BARLEY --drums on his feet.
--drums on his feet. Right.
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
I used to go... Barley hums "Shave and a Haircut" with raspberries for the
last two beat, but clumsily knocks Ian's toast off the counter. Ian lunges for it, but Barley gets it first.
Whoops! Five second rule.
As Barley puts the toast back on the plate, his wrist cuff snags on Ian's sweatshirt, ripping it. Ian GASPS.
It's okay! You just gotta pull it!
Barley yanks his arm to snap the snagged thread, but only rips the seam even more.
LAUREL
Laurel cuts the thread. Ian walks away, trying to stay calm.
You know what, I'm just gonna get some food on the way to school.
I'll sew that later tonight, okay?
Barley jumps up, puts on a helmet, and grabs a sword.
Wait, wait, wait, wait! By the Laws of Yore, I must dub thee a man today! Kneel before me.
Oh, that's okay... I gotta get going!
Alright, well I'll pick you up later and we'll perform the ceremony at school!
NO! No, no, no, no, no. Don't do that. Okay, bye!
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Ian closes the door behind him and lets out a massive SIGH.
EXT. BURGERSHIRE RESTAURANT - DAY
People come and go from a typical fast food restaurant.
INT. BURGERSHIRE RESTAURANT - DAY
A cash register runs up an order. Ian takes his receipt and sits. An elf dad in his forties, GAXTON, and his preteen son sit on the bench next to Ian.
Hey! Go Griffins! What?
Gaxton points to Ian's hoodie.
You go to Willowdale College?
Gaxton's son goes to the counter to wait for their food.
Oh, no. This was my Dad's.
Ian points to the name LIGHTFOOT on the hoodie.
"Lightfoot?" Wilden Lightfoot?
Ian lights up.
You're kidding! I went to college with him! Really? Yeah!
(beat) Boy, I was so sorry to hear that he passed away.
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Ian nods and smiles.
Yeah... thanks.
You know, your dad was a great guy! So confident. When he came into a room, people noticed. (laughing at the memory) The man wore the ugliest purple socks, every single day.
(laugh) What? Why?
Hey, that's exactly what we asked. But he was just bold. I always wished I had a little bit of that in me.
Yeah. Wow. (beat) I've never heard any of this about him before. Do you remember--?
GAXTON'S SON calls out, waving a bag of food. Dad!
Oh! Sorry. Gotta get this guy off to school.
Gaxton holds out his hand to shake Ian's.
Hey, it was nice meeting you!
Yeah, you too.
Ian thinks to himself for a beat.
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script EXT. NEW MUSHROOMTON HIGH SCHOOL - MORNING

Ian sits outside the school, making a list called "NEW ME." SPEAK UP MORE LEARN TO DRIVE INVITE PEOPLE TO PARTY He thinks to himself for a moment and then adds a final item: BE LIKE DAD The bell rings and he heads into the imposing building.
INT. CLASSROOM - DAY
Ian walks into his classroom.
Okay, class, sit down. We're starting roll.
GORGAMON, a slobby, flip-flop-wearing troll, has his feet on Ian's chair.
Hey, uh, Gorgamon... um, would you mind not putting your feet on my chair today?
Sorry dude, gotta keep 'em elevated. Gets the blood flowing to my brain.
It just makes it a little hard for me to fit in there-GORGAMON Well if I don't have good blood flow, I can't concentrate on my school work. You don't want me to do bad school, do you? Uh... no.
Thanks, bro.
Ian sits, scooting up to make room for the gross feet. (c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script EXT. HIGH SCHOOL PARKING LOT - LATER
A GOBLIN TEACHER stands next to a student driver car. DRIVING INSTRUCTOR
First road test, any volunteers?
A single hand raises from the back of a group of students. The crowd parts to reveal a nervous Ian.
INT. DRIVER'S ED CAR - DAY
Ian drives. The Driving Instructor sits in the passenger seat. Two other kids are in the backseat.
A left here.
Ian signals and turns.
Now take this on-ramp to the freeway.
(lacking confidence) Okay, yeah. I'm super ready for that.
Ian's smile fades as he nears the ZOOMING freeway traffic.
(unconvincing) It's nice and fast. DRIVING INSTRUCTOR Just merge into traffic.
Yup, just any minute...
He grows more nervous.
Merge into traffic! Uh...
MERGE INTO TRAFFIC!
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Panicked, Ian tries to merge. A car lays on its horn and Ian retreats back into his lane.
I'm not ready! Pull over.
DRIVING INSTRUCTOR
Ian pulls the car off the freeway.
EXT. HIGH SCHOOL - DAY
Students are hanging out in front of the school, including four friendly TEENS: SADALIA, GURGE, PARTHENOPE, and ALTHEA.
Alright, so what should we do this weekend?
Move to a cooler town?
We see Ian nearby, alone, rehearsing some lines to himself.
Oh, hey! What's up, dudes? I'm, uh, having a party tonight, and was wondering if you wanted to come over and get down on some cake...
Ian's smile drops. Ian checks the writing on his hand.
That's not something anyone says. Okay, don't say dudes. ...Gang? "What's up, gang?"
He crosses out "dudes" and changes it to "gang."
What's up, gang?!
Ian nods, then nervously heads over to the TEENS.
Hey, what's up, gang?
The teens turn to Ian.
Oh, hey... Ian, right?
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
(surprised) Oh, I didn't know you knew my...
Ian looks at his hand. The writing is smeared and sweaty.
Uhhh, anyway... if you like parties, then I was gonna do a party. What?
What I was trying to say, is if you're not doing anything tonight-but I'm sure you probably are doing something tonight--and you like cake like I like cake, I've got a cake... at my house.
The teens look at each other.
Are you inviting us to a party?
That's the one.
Oh, yeah! We don't have any plans.
The others all agree. Ian looks up, surprised.
Really? I guess we can just take

the bus over to my house-Ian is suddenly distracted by metal music in the near distance, a hard-working engine, a backfire. The teens look over as a disaster of a van pulls up, its side painted with a rearing Pegasus surrounded by lightning bolts.
Oh, no, no, no, no, no.
It's Barley. He spots Ian and sticks his head out the window.
Ha-ha! Is that the birthday boy I see?!
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Ian cringes. The van swerves into the school pickup area, and comes to a stop halfway up onto the curb. Barley steps out, in full fantasy garb, and gestures grandly.
Behold! Your chariot awaits!
The group looks at Ian. Ian keeps his back turned to the van.
Do you know that guy? Uh...
Sir Iandore of Lightfoot!
Seems like he's talking to you. HEY, IAN!
Barley honks the horn. Ian turns around sheepishly.
Hey, Barley... Yeah, we're actually gonna take the bus...
The bus?! Nay! I will give you and your companions transport upon
Um, who's Guinevere?
My mighty steed!
Barley slaps the hood of the van. The bumper falls off.
Oops, that's embarrassing! That's okay, girl. We'll patch you back up.
Barley bends to reattach the bumper with duct tape, revealing his butt crack. Ian puts his hand to his face, embarrassed. (c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Ugh... (to teens) He's just joking around.
Ian removes his hand to reveal the ink from his palm is now on his face.
You've got something on your face.
Ian wipes his cheek, smearing ink there.
Oh no, you just--oh! Right.
Ian wipes the other side spreading more ink around.
No, it's--nope.
Ian looks at his hand, then panics.
Oh! Uh... You know what? I just remembered that my birthday is, uh... cancelled. What?
I mean, the party. It was never actually happening. It was just this huge misunderstanding, so I gotta go. Okay, Bye!
Ian races into Barley's van.
INT. VAN - CONTINUOUS
A pile of parking tickets clutter the passenger seat.
Ooh, whoops! Sorry! Let me just file those.
Barley shoves the parking tickets into the glovebox, then notices the smeared letters on Ian's forehead.
Hey! Did those kids write on your face?
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Barley licks his thumb and starts to rub Ian's forehead.
Here, I'll get it.
Ian pushes Barley's hand away.
Can we please just go home?
Okay, we'll perform your birthday ceremony later. Then you'll be ready for adulthood and it's gauntlet of challenges! You know in ancient times, you celebrated your
day of birth with a solemn quest.
Ian looks at the cartoon dragon on the side of the gym, giving an exaggerated thumbs up. Ian slumps in his seat.
INT. LIGHTFOOT HOUSE - DAY
Ian enters the house, defeated. Mom?
INT. IAN'S ROOM - EVENING

Ian sits at his desk, looks at his "NEW ME" list, and crosses off SPEAK UP MORE, LEARN TO DRIVE, INVITE PEOPLE TO PARTY. He pauses, then crosses off the last item: BE LIKE DAD. Ian crumples the list and throws it in his waste basket. He leans back in his chair and looks at the photos on his bulletin board. A photo of WILDEN LIGHTFOOT, Ian's Dad, with three-year-old Barley and pregnant Laurel. A photo of Laurel, toddler Barley, and baby Ian. No Dad. Ian opens his drawer and pulls out a tape labeled: DAD. He puts it into a stereo on his desk and presses play. We hear timeworn audio of a man and woman in conversation. (c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Will, you're not gonna get that thing working.
I think I've got it.
I'm gonna watch from over here when
it blows up. Laurel moves out of range of the microphone. We only hear Dad, then pauses for Laurel's distant, indecipherable words.
(into mic) Hello? Hello?
I'll bet good money you can't get it to work.
Oh, is that right?
Yup. But you're doing a good job of making it look like you know what you're doing.
Well, I'm trying to. (laugh)
Did you check if it had batteries?
(laugh)
No, I'm serious. I know.
So, is it really working?
Well, let's find out. (beat) Okay. Bye.
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Ian smiles, rewinds the tape, and plays it again.
Will, you're not gonna get that thing working.
I think I've got it.
I'm gonna watch from over here when it blows up. Hi, Dad.
We see close-ups of the pictures on the bulletin board as Ian begins to talk over the tape, forming a conversation.
Hello? Hello?
It's me, Ian.
Oh, is that right?
Yeah. Did you have a good day?
Well, I'm trying to.
Yeah, me too. Although, I could clearly use some help.
(laugh)
I sure do wish I could spend a day with you sometime. I know.
Yeah, there's so many things we could do, I bet it'd be really fun!
Well, let's find out. (c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Yeah, I mean, I'd love to! We could, uh-Okay. Bye.
Yeah... Bye.
The tape stops. Ian sits back, deflated.
INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY
Laurel steps on a pewter warrior figure on the ground. AH! MY--!
She opens the basement door and calls to Barley over the din of his music.
Barley, keep your soldiers off my land or our kingdoms will go to war!
Sorry, Mom!
Ugh, this is the world's longest gap year.
Laurel sees Ian on the couch, sewing his sweater.
Honey, I was gonna do that.
That's okay.
Laurel watches him.
Wow, you must have been taught by some kind of sewing master.
Yeah, a very humble sewing master.
Ian finishes sewing. He holds out the thread and Laurel cuts it with the scissors. They've clearly done this a lot. (c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Ian rubs his fingers over the word stitched on the breast of the hoodie: "LIGHTFOOT."
What was Dad like when he was my age? Was he always super confident?
Oh, no. It took him a while to find out who he was.
I wish I'd met him.
Oh, me too. But hey, you know, when your dad got sick, he fought so hard... because he wanted to meet you more than anything.
Laurel watches Ian, heartbroken.
You know what, I have something for you. I was going to wait until after cake but... I think you've waited long enough.
What is it?
It's a gift... from your dad.
INT. HALLWAY - DAY
Laurel pulls down the attic ladder and climbs into the darkness. Ian comes up the stairs with Barley.
What do you mean it's from Dad?
I don't know! Mom said it was for both of us.
What is it?!
Laurel descends the ladder with a long, canvas-wrapped item. (c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
He just said to give you this when you were both over sixteen. I have no idea what it is.
INT. IAN'S ROOM - DAY
Ian and Barley set the gift on Ian's bed. Ian pulls back the cloth to reveal a long, skinny, gnarled piece of wood. NO WAY!
Barley picks it up in amazement.
It's a wizard staff! DAD WAS A WIZARD! What?
Hold on, your Dad was an accountant. I mean, he got interested in a lot of strange
things when he got sick but-Laurel and Ian are confused. Ian looks back under the cloth and sees a rolled up piece of parchment.

There's a letter. (reading) "Dear Ian and Barley: Long ago, the world was full of wonder! It was adventurous, exciting, and best of all... there was magic. And that magic helped all in need. But it wasn't easy to master. And so the world found a simpler way to get by. Over time, magic faded away, but I hope there's a little magic left... in you. And so I wrote this spell so I could see for myself, who my boys grew up to be."
Ian looks at the second page of the letter.
Visitation Spell?
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Barley takes the page from Ian and examines it. It reads VISITATION SPELL and has a diagram of a wizard staff with a beam of light shooting from it, forming a person.
I don't believe this. (excited) This spell brings him back. For one whole day, Dad will be back! What?
Back?! Like back to life? That's not possible.
(holding up staff) It is with this.
I'm gonna meet Dad?
Laurel grabs the letter from the boys. She's beside herself.
Oh, Will, you wonderful nut, what is this?!
Barley digs through the cloth.
Now, a spell this powerful needs an assist element. For this to work Dad would've had to find a... (finding gem) Phoenix Gem!
Barley pulls out an orange gem and exams it.
Wow. There's only a few of these left.
Hold on, is this dangerous?
We're about to find out.
Barley puts the gem in the staff, holds out the staff, and gets suddenly serious. Everyone waits in suspense. (c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Splinter.
BARLEY
Barley grabs the staff, strikes a pose in the center of the room, and begins to read the spell.
"Only once is all we get, grant me this rebirth. 'Til tomorrow's sun has set, one day to walk the earth!"
But nothing happens.
Hold on, I was just gripping it wrong.
Barley adjusts his hands.
Only once is all we get, grant me this rebirth, 'til tomorrow's sun has set, one day to walk THE EARTH! Still nothing.
In quick cuts, Barley tries again and again, with no success.
Only once is all we get, grant me this rebirth.
He tries again.
'Til tomorrow's sun has set... And again.
...one day to walk THE EARTH! And again, exhausted.
One day to walk the earth!
(c)2020 DISNEY*PIXAR - PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL
Onward - 6/5/2020 - Full Script
Losing his patience.
'Til tomorrow's sun has set... Again, frustrated.
One day to walk the earth!
With everything he has left.
...One day... to walk... the earth! One more big attempt.
'Til tomorrow's sun has set...
Laurel and Ian have already given up.
One day to walk the earth!
(gentle) Barley.
He looks back to her, then puts the staff down and sits on the bed. Laurel puts her hand on Barley's shoulder. All three of them are heartbroken.
I'm sorry you guys don't have your Dad here, but this shows just how much he wanted to see you both. So much that he'd try anything. That's still a pretty special gift. Yeah.
Barley leaves.
(to Ian) Hey, want to come with me to pick up your cake?
That's okay. Thanks, Mom.
